At vero eos et accusamus et iusto odio dignissimos ducimus qui blan ditiis prae sentium voluptatum deleniti.

Schedule

School 200m far 250m far Parks Shopping Mall 150m far Restaurant 200m far Hospital 250m far

Testimonial

"I could not have asked for better. Blue Square Limited is hands-down the most customer friendly firm I've ever worked with. As a beginner to owning luxury homes, they virtually carried me through the whole process. Very satisfactory service."

Testimonials

"We wanted a place on Victoria Island Ikoyi/Lekki 1 axis. Somewhere decent, secure and affordable, with potential to maintain its value. We spent months with our agents combing the area. After seeing so many properties, either too expensive, or not spacious enough, we came across Quantum place, and it was love at first sight!"

Mr & Mrs Fash

Testimonials

“We recently purchased a dream Terrace house in Longonot Heights, Elegushi, Lekki, and everyday it looks more and more like the best investment we've ever made”

Mr Ebun Allison
Owner

Request a visit

[contact-form-7]
Smart living

At vero eos et accusamus et iusto odio dignissi ducimus qui blan ditiis praesentium
